---
name: Metric proposal
about: Propose a new Then & Now metric before writing the module
title: "Metric: <name>"
labels: metric
---

**What it measures and why it has predictive power for a bubble cycle**

<!-- One paragraph. What story does this series tell about 1995-2000 that is
worth re-measuring for the AI era? -->

**Data source**

- Series / endpoint:
- Reaches 1995-08-09? (hard requirement; the validator rejects anything that
  cannot cover both eras)
- Cadence: daily / weekly / monthly / quarterly / annual
- License / terms: public domain, cited-academic, or credential-gated?
- Can a fallback CSV be committed? (`redistributable`)

**Engine declaration**

- `type`: ratio_from_start (nominal dollars, prices) or absolute_level
  (units comparable across eras)
- `direction`: up or down
- Proposed `parent` branch: valuation / market_concentration / capex /
  speculation / monetary / a new sub-branch

**Expected verdict**

<!-- Will it conform (rise-peak-fall in the reference era, AI approaching)
or is it a counter-argument? Either is a fine contribution; say which and
why. -->
